overview: Fire Spirit is a Normal-class Elemental monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 18 physical damage, 120 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Range Attack at 0% ratio (0 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Range Attack Nightmare.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Range Attack (0%), Range Attack Nightmare (0%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Burn
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Burn icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Range Attack Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Range Attack Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Range Attack Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
